name: astrosteveo-claude-plugins
description: Curated list of Claude Code plugins for Engineers

plugins.name: commit
plugins.description: Conventional Commits skill for Claude Code

plugins.name: code-quality
plugins.description: Codebase quality skills — code-quality for comprehensive audits, code-sniffer for detecting code smells and AI slop

plugins.name: reconcile-memory
plugins.description: Audit and reconcile Claude Code auto-memory files — deduplication, contradiction detection, staleness assessment, and context hygiene

plugins.name: feature-workflow
plugins.description: Guided clarify → research → plan → implement → review → fix → verify workflow with a live .claude/PROJECT.md so feature state survives across sessions
